title.en: VHT, FILS, and the niche action categories — flow control, MCS negotiation, CDMG/CMMG, GLK, EBCS
title.zh: VHT、FILS 与小众动作类别——流控制、MCS 协商、CDMG/CMMG、GLK、EBCS

blocks.en: Clause 9.6 of 802.11 organises every Action frame into categories, each identified by a Category octet right after the frame header. The big categories (block ack, radio measurement, spectrum management) get all the attention, but a long tail of small, single-purpose categories rounds out the chapter. This lesson is a walking tour of that tail: a grab-bag of one- or two-frame handshakes, each doing exactly one job. Think of them as specialised tools hanging on the back wall of the workshop — rarely reached for, but each shaped for a precise task.
blocks.zh: 802.11 的 9.6 节把每一种动作帧（Action frame）归入不同的类别（category），每个类别由帧头之后紧跟的一个 Category 字节来标识。大类别（块确认、无线测量、频谱管理）总是受人关注，但章节末尾还拖着一长串小巧的、单一用途的类别。本课就是带你逛一逛这条“长尾”：一堆只含一两个帧的握手，每个都只干一件事。可以把它们想象成挂在工坊后墙上的专用工具——平时很少取用，但每一件都是为某个精确任务量身打造的。

blocks.en: We start with the largest of the survivors. The VHT category (9.6.22) carries three frames for Very High Throughput (the 802.11ac generation): VHT Compressed Beamforming feeds the channel-sounding report back to the beamformer (9.6.22.2); Group ID Management is sent by the AP to assign or change a station's user position within MU-MIMO group IDs (9.6.22.3); and Operating Mode Notification tells peers the sender is changing its channel width, max receive spatial streams, or LDPC preference (9.6.22.4). Right next to it, the FILS category (9.6.23) holds a single frame — the FILS Container (9.6.23.2) — which simply ferries one or more FILS IP Address Assignment elements after a station has associated via Fast Initial Link Setup.
blocks.zh: 我们先从“幸存者”里最大的一个讲起。VHT 类别（9.6.22）承载了三个面向甚高吞吐量（即 802.11ac 这一代）的帧：VHT Compressed Beamforming 把信道探测报告反馈给波束赋形发起方（9.6.22.2）；Group ID Management 由 AP 发出，用来指定或更改某站点在 MU-MIMO 组 ID 中的用户位置（9.6.22.3）；Operating Mode Notification 则告知对端，发送方正在更改其信道带宽、最大接收空间流数或 LDPC 偏好（9.6.22.4）。紧挨着它的 FILS 类别（9.6.23）只含一个帧——FILS Container（9.6.23.2）——它的作用很简单：在站点通过“快速初始链路建立（FILS）”完成关联之后，搬运一个或多个 FILS IP 地址分配元素。

blocks.en: Then come the truly tiny categories. Flow Control (9.6.26) is a pair: Flow Suspension tells the recipients to stop sending Data frames to a station for a given number of microseconds (9.6.26.2), and Flow Resumption cancels any outstanding suspension early (9.6.26.3). Control Response MCS Negotiation (9.6.27) is another pair: the Request asks a peer to use a different MCS for its control-response frames by carrying an MCS Difference (9.6.27.2), and the Response replies Accept or Reject (9.6.27.3). Two categories, four frames — each a clean little request/response or stop/go.
blocks.zh: 接下来是真正“迷你”的类别。Flow Control（流控制，9.6.26）是一对：Flow Suspension 让接收方在给定的若干微秒内停止向某站点发送数据帧（9.6.26.2），Flow Resumption 则提前取消任何尚未到期的挂起（9.6.26.3）。Control Response MCS Negotiation（控制响应 MCS 协商，9.6.27）又是一对：Request 通过携带一个 MCS Difference（MCS 差值）来请求对端在其控制响应帧上改用另一种 MCS（9.6.27.2），Response 则回复接受或拒绝（9.6.27.3）。两个类别、四个帧——每个都是干净利落的一来一回（请求/响应）或一停一走。

blocks.en: The millimetre-wave cousins follow. CDMG (9.6.28) supports the China Directional Multi-Gigabit feature on 1.08 GHz-wide channels, with three request/response pairs: Notification Period (9.6.28.2/.3) negotiates an NP/BHI duration so a station can stand up its BSS on a free channel; Channel Splitting (9.6.28.4/.5) coordinates splitting a 2.16 GHz channel into adjacent 1.08 GHz halves; and CDMG Allocation (9.6.28.6/.7) requests and grants schedule time on a 2.16 GHz channel. CMMG (9.6.29) is the China Millimeter-wave Multi-Gigabit set: CMMG Compressed Beamforming returns its sounding report (9.6.29.2) and CMMG Operating Mode Notification signals a width/stream change (9.6.29.3) — the mmWave echoes of the VHT frames above.
blocks.zh: 再往后是它们的毫米波“表亲”。CDMG（9.6.28）支持在 1.08 GHz 宽信道上运行的“中国定向多吉比特”特性，包含三对请求/响应：Notification Period（9.6.28.2/.3）协商一个 NP/BHI 时长，让站点得以在空闲信道上建立自己的 BSS；Channel Splitting（9.6.28.4/.5）协调把一个 2.16 GHz 信道拆分成相邻的两个 1.08 GHz 半信道；CDMG Allocation（9.6.28.6/.7）则请求并授予 2.16 GHz 信道上的调度时间。CMMG（9.6.29）是“中国毫米波多吉比特”这一套：CMMG Compressed Beamforming 回送其探测报告（9.6.29.2），CMMG Operating Mode Notification 通告带宽/空间流的更改（9.6.29.3）——正是上文 VHT 帧在毫米波领域的回声。

blocks.en: Two categories close out the tour. GLK (9.6.30) — General Link, the bridge between 802.11 and 802.3-style groupcast — defines exactly one frame: GLK Groupcast Mode Change Notification, which carries a GLK-GCR Parameter Set element to announce a change in the groupcast transmission policy (9.6.30.2). And EBCS (9.6.35) — Enhanced Broadcast Service — is a request/response pair: a station sends EBCS Content Request to its associated EBCS AP asking for one or more broadcast traffic streams (9.6.35.2), and the AP replies with EBCS Content Response (9.6.35.3). Each of these last categories is the entire home of a niche feature, compressed into one or two frames.
blocks.zh: 两个类别为本次巡览收尾。GLK（9.6.30）——General Link，即 802.11 与 802.3 风格组播之间的桥梁——只定义了一个帧：GLK Groupcast Mode Change Notification，它携带一个 GLK-GCR Parameter Set 元素，用来通告组播传输策略的变更（9.6.30.2）。而 EBCS（9.6.35）——增强广播服务（Enhanced Broadcast Service）——是一对请求/响应：站点向其关联的 EBCS AP 发送 EBCS Content Request，请求一个或多个广播业务流（9.6.35.2），AP 则以 EBCS Content Response 回复（9.6.35.3）。这最后几个类别，各自就是某个小众特性的全部归宿，被压缩成了一两个帧。

blocks.en: A pattern to take away: most of these categories follow the same shape — a 1-octet Action field after the Category octet selects which frame in the category this is, and request/response pairs use a Dialog Token to match a reply to its request. Once you recognise the Category + Action-field + Dialog-Token skeleton, every one of these niche frames decodes the same way; only the payload elements differ.
blocks.zh: 一个值得带走的规律：这些类别大多遵循同样的骨架——在 Category 字节之后有一个 1 字节的 Action 字段，用来在该类别内选定具体是哪个帧；而请求/响应配对则用一个 Dialog Token（对话令牌）把回复与它对应的请求匹配起来。一旦你认出“Category + Action 字段 + Dialog Token”这套骨架，这里每一个小众帧的解析方式都是一样的，唯一不同的只是其中承载的负载元素。

summary.en: How the Action-field tables actually enumerate each frame
summary.zh: Action 字段表是如何逐一枚举每个帧的

blocks.en: Each category opens with an 'Action field' subclause holding a value table. VHT (Table 9-605) maps value 0 to VHT Compressed Beamforming, 1 to Group ID Management, 2 to Operating Mode Notification. FILS (Table 9-609) defines only value 0 = FILS Container. Flow Control (Table 9-627) lists 0 = Flow suspension, 1 = Flow resumption, both marked time-priority when sent as Action No Ack. Control Response MCS Negotiation (Table 9-630) has 0 = Request, 1 = Response, and the Response carries a Command field whose values (Table 9-633) are 0 = Reject, 1 = Accept. CDMG (Table 9-634) numbers its six frames 0–5 across the three request/response pairs. CMMG (Table 9-638) reserves value 0 for CMMG CSI, 1 for Compressed Beamforming, 2 for Operating Mode Notification. GLK (Table 9-641) defines only 0 = Groupcast Mode Change Notification. EBCS (Table 9-656) uses 0 = content request, 1 = content response. The CDMG and EBCS request frames each carry a Dialog Token the response copies back, so a station can pair each reply with its outstanding request.
blocks.zh: 每个类别都以一个“Action 字段”子条款开篇，其中包含一张取值表。VHT（表 9-605）把取值 0 映射为 VHT Compressed Beamforming，1 为 Group ID Management，2 为 Operating Mode Notification。FILS（表 9-609）只定义了取值 0 = FILS Container。Flow Control（表 9-627）列出 0 = 流挂起、1 = 流恢复，二者在以 Action No Ack 帧发送时都标记为时间优先。Control Response MCS Negotiation（表 9-630）取 0 = 请求、1 = 响应，且响应携带一个 Command 字段，其取值（表 9-633）为 0 = 拒绝、1 = 接受。CDMG（表 9-634）把它三对请求/响应共六个帧编号为 0–5。CMMG（表 9-638）将取值 0 留给 CMMG CSI，1 为 Compressed Beamforming，2 为 Operating Mode Notification。GLK（表 9-641）只定义 0 = Groupcast Mode Change Notification。EBCS（表 9-656）用 0 = 内容请求、1 = 内容响应。CDMG 和 EBCS 的请求帧各自携带一个 Dialog Token，响应会原样拷回，从而让站点能把每个回复与其尚未完成的请求配对。

9.6.28 CDMG (Notification Period, Channel Splitting, Allocation pairs); 9.6.29 CMMG (Compressed Beamforming, Operating Mode Notification)
